description: Canonical ambiguous-task routing example for the frozen OPL routed-action gateway.

payload.reason: The request mixes formal manuscript packaging and committee-slide delivery semantics without a single primary deliverable.
required_clarification: Is the primary output a formal research submission package or a presentation deliverable?
If presentation delivery is primary, should the family be ppt_deck or another RedCube family?

payload.request_summary: Package the study for submission and also turn it into a defense-ready deck without clarifying which deliverable is primary.
payload.reason: The request mixes two top-level deliverable semantics, so OPL must stop before inventing a routed outcome.

governance_audit_record.summary: Routing remains blocked pending clarification of the primary deliverable semantics.

boundary_notes: OPL does not invent a workstream owner or build a handoff payload while the request remains ambiguous.
No domain truth is created; the only top-level artifact is the auditable unresolved-routing record.
